title: Hacker wipes Romania's entire land registry database
excerpt: In other news: Graykey maker sues former employee for leaking exploit; Hugging Face was hacked using AI; unauth RCE finally found in WordPress.
content_html:
This newsletter is brought to you by Thinkst, the makers of the much-loved Thinkst Canary. You can subscribe to an audio version of this newsletter as a podcast by searching for "Risky Business" in your podcatcher or subscribing via this RSS feed. You can also add the Risky Business newsletter as a Preferred Source to your Google search results by going here.

A hacker has breached Romania's cadastre agency and wiped the country's entire land registry database following a failed extortion attempt.

The hack has brought Romania's entire real-estate market to a standstill as official apps and websites have been offline for a week. Notaries can't record new transactions while citizens can't obtain proof of ownership or detailed land records.

Email servers at the National Agency for Cadastre and Real Estate Advertising (Agenția Națională de Cadastru și Publicitate Imobiliară, or ANCPI) were also down as part of the incident.

Sources told Risky Business that the hacker entered using valid credentials, mapped internal systems, and wiped systems and backups after failing to extort the agency.

The incident became public on July 14 as the hacker started deleting data. A day later, some of ANCPI's stolen data was put up for sale on a known hacking forum. The posted data included employee credentials, internal documents, and details on the agency's IT network.

Since the hack, officials restored their website and posted a message announcing they are rebuilding the agency's entire network from scratch. Even if the hacker claims they deleted backups, the agency appears to have had an offline copy, otherwise things would have gotten really messy over the coming months in Romania.

The stolen data was posted online by an account with the name ByteToBreach, a known hacker who also breached Sweden's e-government portal this year, and many other government agencies and high-profile companies over the past year.

Security firm KELA published a profile on ByteToBreach last December and hinted they might be located in Algeria, but since the ANCPI hack has updated the post and outright doxxed the hacker as Zakaria Mahdjoub, an individual from Oran, Algeria.

Well, that will make the job of Romanian law enforcement a hell lot easier! gj!

Romania joins Poland, Slovakia, Greece, Morocco, Russia, and Ukraine as countries that had their land registry agencies hacked over the past three years.

Risky Business Podcasts

In this edition of Seriously Risky Business, Tom Uren and James Wilson talk about different ways ransomware groups are taking advantage of AI. The relatively new FulcrumSec group uses simple techniques to breach companies and then uses AI to get more leverage over victims in its extortion negotiations. 

Breaches, hacks, and security incidents

Hugging Face hacked using AI: A threat actor used an autonomous AI agent to breach AI platform Hugging Face last week. The attacker used exploits in the platform's data-processing pipeline to pivot to some parts of the company's internal systems. Hugging Face says no customer data was exposed but the attacker stole internal datasets and some cloud credentials. Hugging Face says it tried to use a frontier AI model to analyze the hack but was blocked by its guardrails, which couldn't differentiate between an IR event and offensive operations. [Hugging Face]

HuggingFace got hacked by an AI. What stuck out to me was the guardrail asymmetry. The attacker had no constraints, but HF's response ran afoul of the abuse guardrails, forcing them into an unplanned switch to local models. Another aspect for your IR plans. huggingface.co/blog/securit...

[image or embed]

— David J. Bianco (@davidjbianco.bsky.social) July 17, 2026 at 10:59 PM

Coca-Cola hit by ransomware: Coca-Cola has suspended production at its Fairlife dairy subsidiary after a ransomware attack. In an SEC filing, Coca-Cola said hackers accessed Fairlife production-related systems this week. Production has been halted at Fairlife US factories. The company's Canadian production lines were unaffected. No ransomware group has taken credit for the incident, yet. [SEC // TechCrunch]

Qantas breach has a cause: The hack of Australian airline company Qantas last year was traced back to a social engineering attack. Hackers called an overseas contractor posing as the Qantas IT team to access their systems, connect to the Qantas CRM platform, and exfiltrate the data of 5.7 million customers. Australia's Information Commissioner says Qantas took all the steps to protect customer data on its side and will not be opening further probes into the hack. [OAIC]

Suno hack: A threat actor hacked AI music generator platform Suno and dumped internal files and documents online. The files allegedly show that Suno scraped millions of songs and lyrics from YouTube Music, Deezer, Genius, and other music platforms. The leaked files include source code and detailed scraping instructions targeting the platforms. Several music industry groups have sued Suno over the past year for training its AI song generator tool on copyrighted material. Suno was allegedly hacked following a compromise with the Shai-Hulud npm worm. [404 Media // The Verge]

WINDTRE fined for breaches: Italy's privacy watchdog has fined telecommunications provider WINDTRE €1.7 million for "serious security deficiencies" that led to two security breaches last year. [GPDP]

KNPP leak: Threat intel analyst Rakesh Krishnan looks at a leak of sensitive files from India's KNPP nuclear power plant after one of its contractors got hit by the World Leaks extortion group. [The Raven File]

Ostium crypto-heist: The Ostium DeFi platform was hacked for $18 million last week after hackers exploited its own price-reporting infrastructure. [CoinDesk]

Estée Lauder discloses Oracle EBS breach: Cosmetics giant Estée Lauder has confirmed that hackers stole customer data from its Oracle E-Business Suite platform last year. The company disclosed the breach to US state officials almost a year after it took place. This is Estée's second breach after another one in 2023. The Clop hacking group is behind the hacking spree that targeted Oracle EBS servers. [California OAG]

Ernst & Young also discloses breach: Accounting and risk management giant Ernst & Young also disclosed a breach, but the disclosure has been so sanitized of any info that I can't tell what's this about. [California OAG]

DigiCert breach linked to CylindricalCanine: Security firm Expel has linked the hack of certificate authority DigiCert to CylindricalCanine, a sub-group of GoldenEyeDog, a financially motivated group operating out of China. [Expel]

General tech and privacy

Ofcom opens TikTok inquiry: The UK's communications watchdog has opened a formal investigation into TikTok for failing to protect children from harmful content on the platform, as per the UK's Online Safety Act. [Ofcom]

Moonshot releases Kimi K3: Chinese AI startup Moonshot has unveiled a new AI model named Kimi K3, which the company claims can rival the ones from top American firms like Anthropic and OpenAI. [Kimi // Business Insider]

Rust in Chromium: Microsoft is working on adding a Rust-based PNG image decoder in the Chromium browser project, a more secure component for processing PNG images for Chrome, Edge, Opera, and other similar browsers. [Microsoft]

EU password manager has ties to Russia: An investigation has revealed that Spain-based password manager Passwork shares its codebase and a "near-identical user manual" with a similarly-named password manager advertised in Russia. The Spanish version has allegedly been receiving software updates from an UAE firm managed by one of Passwork's Russian co-founders. The Spanish Passwork's customer list includes European government agencies and universities, which raises concerns of espionage. [OCCRP]

India fines HP over cartel practices: The Indian government fined HP $14.4 million over cartel practices after the company colluded with resellers to fix prices for ink cartridges, toner, and other printing supplies in government contract bids. [ArsTechnica]

SanFran CAO cracks down on nudify apps: The San Francisco City Attorney's Office has sent cease-and-desist letters to Apple and Google and ordered the tech giants to remove AI nudify apps from their stores and stop indirectly profiting from CSAM. [WIRED]

Government, politics, and policy

Morocco confirmed as NSO customer: A whistleblower and former member of Morocco’s domestic intelligence service has confirmed their government's access to the NSO Pegasus spyware, contrary to the government's past public denials. The tool was heavily used to spy on dissidents, journalists, and even politicians abroad. [OCCRP // Forbidden Stories]

UK scraps digital ID scheme: The UK government will scrap a proposed digital ID scheme once its new prime minister Andy Burnham takes office on Monday. The scheme was announced last September and was supposed to enter into effect next year. It involved issuing a digital ID for UK citizens and legal residents in the form of a mobile app. The ID was meant to serve as proof for the Right to Work in the UK. [Reuters]

US govt fails to rotate cyber personnel: The US government failed to follow through with one of its own programs to rotate cybersecurity employees between federal agencies. Only eight employees participated in the program since 2022. The program was meant to teach employees new skills before returning to their native agencies. [GAO // Cyberscoop]

White House announces Gold Eagle program: The Trump administration has launched a new program to help coordinate the disclosure and patching of vulnerabilities in open-source projects and critical infrastructure. The new Gold Eagle program was designed to receive bug reports at scale, usually found using AI tools and frontier AI models. CISA, the Treasury Department, and the Pentagon are involved in the program. [White House]

France bans Polymarket: The French government has ordered internet service providers to block access to prediction market betting platform Polymarket. The French regulatory authority formally banned the platform in 2024 and threatened fines of up to €200,000 for French citizens placing bets on the platform. The agency moved into active enforcement after data showed Polymarket's userbase grew in France despite the ban. Spain also banned Polymarket in May. [Engadget]

In this Risky Business sponsor interview, Casey Ellis chats with Haroon Meer from Thinkst about building companies customers don’t hate. Haroon explains why Thinkst still offers Canary tokens for free and why it has avoided annual price hikes on its paid products. They talk about Eric Ries’s “Incorruptible”, Rob Lee’s 100-year-company approach at Dragos, and why keeping customers happy is a better business strategy than chasing easy sugar highs.

Arrests, cybercrime, and threat intel

Graykey maker sues employee for leaking exploit: Graykey-maker Magnet Forensics has sued a former employee for allegedly leaking details about a proprietary iPhone exploit. Magnet claims Mario Del Gaudio shared details of the exploit with his new employer and rival company Paradigm Shift. The exploit was tracked internally at Magnet as MSG but was disclosed publicly by Paradigm Shift in a blog post as usbliter8. The exploit allows attackers to run malicious code inside the SecureROM of Apple devices using A12 and A13 chips. It is a hardware bug and unpatchable. [Bloomberg // CourtListener // usbliter8 blog post]

TfL hackers get five years: A UK judge has sentenced two members of the Scattered Spider hacking group to 5.5 years in prison each. Thalha Jubair and Owen Flowers pleaded guilty last month to hacking the London public transport authority in August of 2024. The hack caused months of disruptions at Transport for London and caused damages of £39 million. Jubair is also charged in the US with hacking and extorting 47 US companies and allegedly seeking ransoms of at least $115 million. [NCA]

REvil hacker arrested in Armenia: Armenian authorities have arrested a suspected member of the REvil ransomware group. Alexander Ermakov was arrested at the Yerevan airport at the end of June on an Interpol arrest warrant. A man named Alexander Ermakov is the main suspect behind the ransomware attack on Australia's Medibank insurer in 2022. Russian media claims that Armenian authorities arrested a man with the same name and that the real Ermakov is in Russia, where he is serving a restriction of freedom sentence that prevents him from traveling abroad. [RIA Novosti // Risky Business]

Scam center dismantled in Timor-Leste: Police in Timor-Leste have raided three cyber scam compounds in the capital city of Dili. Police arrested 253 suspects, with most being Chinese and Indonesian nationals. Authorities also raided another compound last month. [ABC]

DHS seizes 30,000 mobile SIM cards: The DHS Homeland Security Investigations seized more than 30,000 mobile SIM cards in June and July as part of a crackdown against telephone fraud. [Bloomberg]

GTA hacker released from hospital, sent to prison: A member of the Lapsus$ hacking group has been released from a secure hospital and transferred to a normal prison in the UK. Arion Kurtaj is set to face trial again for hacking Rockstar Games in 2022 and releasing GTA5 source code and GTA6 gameplay. Kurtaj was diagnosed with severe autism and sentenced to an indefinite hospital order in December 2023. [GameRant // Polygon]

UAT-11795 profile: Cisco is tracking a new e-crime group targeting companies in the US and Europe with the Starland RAT and a command-and-control (C2) memory implant named the WLDR Agent. [Cisco Talos]

TAG-150 evolution: eSentire has published details on the changes to the tradecraft of TAG-150, an e-crime group behind the CastleLoader, CastleBot, and CastleRAT malware strains—also tracked as DinDoor, a Deno-based loader, NightshadeC2, and DenoRAT, a Deno-based Remote Access Trojan (RAT). The biggest change is their adoption of ClickFix, everyone's favorite infection vector. [eSentire]

More ViPNeT exploitation in Russia: A hacking group is planting backdoors inside Russian companies using the ViPNet enterprise VPN software. The attackers first compromise one VPN node and then exploit the software's update mechanism to install the backdoor on the whole network. ViPNet owner Infotecs has confirmed the attacks and released security updates. A similar wave of attacks also took place in April last year. [Infotecs // PositiveTechnologies // Kaspersky // Last year's attacks]

Scarcity scams are here to stay: Scarcity scams are a new category of online scams where threat actors run fake sites for online services with limited availability or spots. This type of scam has exploded across the past few years and typically target the reservation sites of various government websites across the world. [DomainTools]

Sextortion campaigns: A recent spike in sextortion email scams has been linked to the good ol' Trik/Phorpiex botnet, which is still alive after all these years. [PointWild]

Text salting in the wild: Threat actors are using a technique named "text salting" to hide text inside their emails and bypass email spam filters for both traditional and AI-powered email security systems. Barracuda has seen the technique used in over a million retail-themed phishing scams. [Barracuda]

RubyGems malware: At least two dormant RubyGems accounts have been compromised to push malware to old projects. [Aikido Security // Step Security]

OAuth Client ID Spoofing: Threat actors are using OAuth client ID spoofing to abuse Microsoft Entra ID for account enumeration, check password validity, and account state. The technique is seeing increased usage, per Proofpoint. [Proofpoint]

Proofpoint observed two independent campaigns adopting this tradecraft: • UNK_PyReq2323: >1M targeted users, 700K+ spoofed client IDs • UNK_OutFlareAZ: >2M targeted users, 3.7M spoofed client IDs Different tooling and infrastructure suggest growing adoption.

— ThreatInsight (@threatinsight.proofpoint.com) July 14, 2026 at 6:56 PM

Malware technical reports

XZ Utils backdoor: Adrian Mastronardi has published a book with the in-depth story of the XZ Utils backdoor incident from 2024. [Half a Second]

Pegasus spyware: The security team at Amnesty International has published the most comprehensive analysis of the Pegasus spyware to date, leveraging the insights from past reports and the recent WhatsApp lawsuit. [Amnesty International]

ClickLock Stealer: A new infostealer targeting macOS users has been spotted in the wild. This one has been named ClickLock because it blends ClickFix and locker tactics for its distribution and installation process. [Group-IB]

CrashStealer: There's also another macOS infostealer in the wild, named CrashStealer because it tries to impersonate Apple's crash-reporting framework to harvest browser credentials, cryptocurrency wallets, and keychain data. [Jamf]

ACR Stealer: Microsoft has reported an increase in attacks deploying the ACR Stealer across customer environments since April. [Microsoft]

BoryptGrab: Almost 300 GitHub repositories impersonating legitimate software were actually spreading a version of the BoryptGrab infostealer. [Arctic Wolf]

TELEPUZ: Elastic has spotted a new malware framework being deployed in the wild that appears to be related to an upcoming MaaS. [Elastic]

Spirals ransomware: Broadcom's Symantec team has spotted a new ransomware strain named Spirals being deployed in Asia. Not much information about it so far. [Broadcom]

NadMesh botnet: A newly discovered botnet is specifically targeting AI infrastructure and the MCP ecosystem. The NadMesh botnet has targeted Ollama, ComfyUI, and other AI-related servers since early July. The botnet plants SSH backdoors for control and future access. According to Chinese security firm QiAnXin, the botnet appears to be an "industrial-grade" operation with a "clear commercial intent." [QiAnXin]

OkoBot framework: Researchers have found a new modular malware framework named OkoBot that resembles an infostealer but puts more focus on stealing sensitive data from cryptocurrency owners and related services. [Kaspersky]

"The OkoBot campaign has been ongoing for over a year, and it remains active at the time of publication. Moreover, it is adapting, which indicates that this framework is being maintained and distribution campaigns continue."

WackoGinx phishing kit: Researchers have found a new phishing kit named WackoGinx (also WachoGinx) that can run campaigns targeting M365, Facebook, Gmail, LinkedIn, and PayPal. [Threatactix]

In this Soap Box edition of the podcast, Patrick Gray chats with Thinkst Canary founder Haroon Meer about his "decade of deception." 

APTs, cyber-espionage, and info-ops

UTA0533 is behind new SonicWall zero-day wave: A hacking group tracked as UTA0533 is behind two zero-days exploited in SonicWall SMA appliances. The zero-days include an SSRF and a code injection vulnerability that grant the group root-level access to the device. The attacks began in late June and are deploying malware designed specifically for SonicWall SMA VPN appliances. SonicWall released patches for both zero-days last week. [Volexity // SonicWall patches]

GoSerpent campaign: Kaspersky is tracking a new APT group deploying the GoSerpent backdoor, Stowaway, and TmcLoader in campaigns targeting government and diplomatic entities in Southeast Asia. No attribution yet. [Kaspersky]

Laundry Bear member worked at Kaspersky: Denis Obrezko, the Russian national who was arrested in Thailand last year, extradited to the US, and charged with hacks part of the Laundry Bear APT group, also worked for Russian security firm Kaspersky. A team of threat intel analysts going by Ctrl-Alt-Intel has also published a profile on Obrezko and the opsec mistakes that led to his arrest, which is well worth your read. [Reuters // Ctrl-Alt-Intel]

Love that a leaked McDonald’s order helped corroborate the attribution 😂 Great pivots! https://t.co/XZUeBAWZYZ

— Chi-en (Ashley) Shen (@ashl3y-shen.bsky.social) (@ashl3y_shen) July 14, 2026

Sandworm adopts ClickFix: Even if they're one of Russia's most advanced cyber-espionage groups, Sandworm is now using ClickFix for malware delivery. [CERT-UA]

More DPRK on npm: OSM's Jenn Gile has linked two clusters of npm malware back to North Korean hackers and their PolinRider campaign. [OpenSourceMalware]

Operation Capsule Vault: And speaking of DPRK hacking campaigns, there's one spreading the RokRAT malware using edu- and academic-related phishing lures. [Genians]

Contagious Interview campaign: There's nothing more dangerous right now than trying to find a job in the IT sector, thanks to North Korean hackers! Putting the irony aside, there's a new report on the Contagious Interview campaign that Elastic tracks as REF9403 activity. The report covers the use of SVG files to hide malicious commands via steganography, which is kind of original in its own specific way because SVG files haven't been broadly abused for steganography until now. [Elastic]

Vulnerabilities, security research, and bug bounty

wp2shell vulnerability: The WordPress team has released a security update to patch one of the most critical bugs ever found in the project's code. The vulnerability is an SQL injection in the WordPress REST API that can be exploited by remote unauthenticated attackers to run malicious code on any WordPress site. The issue can be exploited without any preconditions and impacts all WordPress versions released since last December. WordPress sites power more than 41% of all internet sites. The bug was discovered by Searchlight Cyber and is tracked as CVE-2026-63030, or wp2shell. [Searchlight Cyber // wp2shell // WordPress patch]

HollowByte attack: A new vulnerability can crash OpenSSL servers using only an 11 bytes payload. The attack can be exploited by remote unauthenticated attackers and force servers to allocate huge amounts of memory before any secure TLS handshake even begins. The OpenSSL project released patches for both current and old library versions last month. The vulnerability was discovered by Okta and is named HollowByte. [Okta]

Android lockscreen bypass: Just like Siri has been exploited for years to bypass the lockscreen, it's now Gemini's turn to be abused to bypass the Android lockscreen. [Android Headlines]

Vulnerability disclosure guide: CISA and international partners have released joint guidance on establishing proper coordinated disclosure programs. [CISA]

Nightmare Eclipse drops LegacyHive: Security researcher Nightmare Eclipse has released a new Windows exploit last week. Named LegacyHive, the zero-day is a local privilege escalation in the Windows User Profile Service. [Project Nightcrawler // GitHub // SecurityWeek]

AoE RCE: The last thing you ever expected is probably a remote code execution exploit in the good ol' Age of Empires game.

Here’s the Age of Empires RCE from yesterday’s Patch Tuesday: CVE-2026-50663.

Join an attacker’s lobby, (auto-)accept UCG, and you get remote code execution. pic.twitter.com/QmMkY07C8S

— Rick de Jager (@rdjgr) July 15, 2026

Infosec industry

Threat/trend reports: Acronis, CompariTech, Moonlock, ReliaQuest, Sonatype, Sophos, Thales, and WatchGuard have recently published reports and summaries covering various threats and infosec industry trends.

BSides Budapest 2026 videos: Talks from the BSides Budapest 2026 security conference, which took place in April, are available on YouTube. 

Risky Business podcasts

In this edition of Between Two Nerds, Tom Uren and The Grugq discuss just how important exploits are for cyber operations using data published in a new paper authored by two members of Ukraine’s cyber security agency.

In this episode of Risky Business Features, James Wilson chats with SOCRadar CISO Ensar Seker and James Wilson chat about the company’s deep dive into the Fortibleed campaign. A small investigation into a curiously open directory on an unknown server expanded into the discovery of an attack that targeted 400,000 Fortinet devices.

Magnet claims Mario Del Gaudio shared details of the exploit with his new employer and rival company Paradigm Shift. The exploit was tracked internally at Magnet as MSG but was disclosed publicly by Paradigm Shift in a blog post as usbliter8. The exploit allows attackers to run malicious code inside the SecureROM of Apple devices using A12 and A13 chips. It is a hardware bug and unpatchable. [Bloomberg // CourtListener // usbliter8 blog post]TfL hackers get five years: A UK judge has sentenced two members of the Scattered Spider hacking group to 5.5 years in prison each. Thalha Jubair and Owen Flowers pleaded guilty last month to hacking the London public transport authority in August of 2024. The hack caused months of disruptions at Transport for London and caused damages of £39 million. Jubair is also charged in the US with hacking and extorting 47 US companies and allegedly seeking ransoms of at least $115 million. [NCA]REvil hacker arrested in Armenia: Armenian authorities have arrested a suspected member of the REvil ransomware group. Alexander Ermakov was arrested at the Yerevan airport at the end of June on an Interpol arrest warrant. A man named Alexander Ermakov is the main suspect behind the ransomware attack on Australia's Medibank insurer in 2022. Russian media claims that Armenian authorities arrested a man with the same name and that the real Ermakov is in Russia, where he is serving a restriction of freedom sentence that prevents him from traveling abroad. [RIA Novosti // Risky Business]Scam center dismantled in Timor-Leste: Police in Timor-Leste have raided three cyber scam compounds in the capital city of Dili. Police arrested 253 suspects, with most being Chinese and Indonesian nationals. Authorities also raided another compound last month. [ABC]DHS seizes 30,000 mobile SIM cards: The DHS Homeland Security Investigations seized more than 30,000 mobile SIM cards in June and July as part of a crackdown against telephone fraud. [Bloomberg]GTA hacker released from hospital, sent to prison: A member of the Lapsus$ hacking group has been released from a secure hospital and transferred to a normal prison in the UK. Arion Kurtaj is set to face trial again for hacking Rockstar Games in 2022 and releasing GTA5 source code and GTA6 gameplay. Kurtaj was diagnosed with severe autism and sentenced to an indefinite hospital order in December 2023. [GameRant // Polygon]UAT-11795 profile: Cisco is tracking a new e-crime group targeting companies in the US and Europe with the Starland RAT and a command-and-control (C2) memory implant named the WLDR Agent. [Cisco Talos]TAG-150 evolution: eSentire has published details on the changes to the tradecraft of TAG-150, an e-crime group behind the CastleLoader, CastleBot, and CastleRAT malware strains—also tracked as DinDoor, a Deno-based loader, NightshadeC2, and DenoRAT, a Deno-based Remote Access Trojan (RAT). The biggest change is their adoption of ClickFix, everyone's favorite infection vector. [eSentire]More ViPNeT exploitation in Russia: A hacking group is planting backdoors inside Russian companies using the ViPNet enterprise VPN software. The attackers first compromise one VPN node and then exploit the software's update mechanism to install the backdoor on the whole network. ViPNet owner Infotecs has confirmed the attacks and released security updates. A similar wave of attacks also took place in April last year. [Infotecs // PositiveTechnologies // Kaspersky // Last year's attacks]Scarcity scams are here to stay: Scarcity scams are a new category of online scams where threat actors run fake sites for online services with limited availability or spots. This type of scam has exploded across the past few years and typically target the reservation sites of various government websites across the world. [DomainTools]Sextortion campaigns: A recent spike in sextortion email scams has been linked to the good ol' Trik/Phorpiex botnet, which is still alive after all these years. [PointWild]Text salting in the wild: Threat actors are using a technique named "text salting" to hide text inside their emails and bypass email spam filters for both traditional and AI-powered email security systems. Barracuda has seen the technique used in over a million retail-themed phishing scams. [Barracuda]RubyGems malware: At least two dormant RubyGems accounts have been compromised to push malware to old projects. [Aikido Security // Step Security]OAuth Client ID Spoofing: Threat actors are using OAuth client ID spoofing to abuse Microsoft Entra ID for account enumeration, check password validity, and account state. The technique is seeing increased usage, per Proofpoint. [Proofpoint] Proofpoint observed two independent campaigns adopting this tradecraft: • UNK_PyReq2323: >1M targeted users, 700K+ spoofed client IDs • UNK_OutFlareAZ: >2M targeted users, 3.7M spoofed client IDs Different tooling and infrastructure suggest growing adoption.— ThreatInsight (@threatinsight.proofpoint.com) July 14, 2026 at 6:56 PM Malware technical reportsXZ Utils backdoor: Adrian Mastronardi has published a book with the in-depth story of the XZ Utils backdoor incident from 2024. [Half a Second]Pegasus spyware: The security team at Amnesty International has published the most comprehensive analysis of the Pegasus spyware to date, leveraging the insights from past reports and the recent WhatsApp lawsuit. [Amnesty International]ClickLock Stealer: A new infostealer targeting macOS users has been spotted in the wild. This one has been named ClickLock because it blends ClickFix and locker tactics for its distribution and installation process. [Group-IB]CrashStealer: There's also another macOS infostealer in the wild, named CrashStealer because it tries to impersonate Apple's crash-reporting framework to harvest browser credentials, cryptocurrency wallets, and keychain data. [Jamf]ACR Stealer: Microsoft has reported an increase in attacks deploying the ACR Stealer across customer environments since April. [Microsoft]BoryptGrab: Almost 300 GitHub repositories impersonating legitimate software were actually spreading a version of the BoryptGrab infostealer. [Arctic Wolf]TELEPUZ: Elastic has spotted a new malware framework being deployed in the wild that appears to be related to an upcoming MaaS. [Elastic]Spirals ransomware: Broadcom's Symantec team has spotted a new ransomware strain named Spirals being deployed in Asia. Not much information about it so far. [Broadcom]NadMesh botnet: A newly discovered botnet is specifically targeting AI infrastructure and the MCP ecosystem. The NadMesh botnet has targeted Ollama, ComfyUI, and other AI-related servers since early July. The botnet plants SSH backdoors for control and future access. According to Chinese security firm QiAnXin, the botnet appears to be an "industrial-grade" operation with a "clear commercial intent." [QiAnXin]OkoBot framework: Researchers have found a new modular malware framework named OkoBot that resembles an infostealer but puts more focus on stealing sensitive data from cryptocurrency owners and related services. [Kaspersky]"The OkoBot campaign has been ongoing for over a year, and it remains active at the time of publication. Moreover, it is adapting, which indicates that this framework is being maintained and distribution campaigns continue."WackoGinx phishing kit: Researchers have found a new phishing kit named WackoGinx (also WachoGinx) that can run campaigns targeting M365, Facebook, Gmail, LinkedIn, and PayPal. [Threatactix]In this Soap Box edition of the podcast, Patrick Gray chats with Thinkst Canary founder Haroon Meer about his "decade of deception." APTs, cyber-espionage, and info-opsUTA0533 is behind new SonicWall zero-day wave: A hacking group tracked as UTA0533 is behind two zero-days exploited in SonicWall SMA appliances. The zero-days include an SSRF and a code injection vulnerability that grant the group root-level access to the device. The attacks began in late June and are deploying malware designed specifically for SonicWall SMA VPN appliances. SonicWall released patches for both zero-days last week. [Volexity // SonicWall patches]GoSerpent campaign: Kaspersky is tracking a new APT group deploying the GoSerpent backdoor, Stowaway, and TmcLoader in campaigns targeting government and diplomatic entities in Southeast Asia. No attribution yet. [Kaspersky]Laundry Bear member worked at Kaspersky: Denis Obrezko, the Russian national who was arrested in Thailand last year, extradited to the US, and charged with hacks part of the Laundry Bear APT group, also worked for Russian security firm Kaspersky. A team of threat intel analysts going by Ctrl-Alt-Intel has also published a profile on Obrezko and the opsec mistakes that led to his arrest, which is well worth your read. [Reuters // Ctrl-Alt-Intel] Love that a leaked McDonald’s order helped corroborate the attribution 😂 Great pivots! https://t.co/XZUeBAWZYZ— Chi-en (Ashley) Shen (@ashl3y-shen.bsky.social) (@ashl3y_shen) July 14, 2026 Sandworm adopts ClickFix: Even if they're one of Russia's most advanced cyber-espionage groups, Sandworm is now using ClickFix for malware delivery. [CERT-UA]More DPRK on npm: OSM's Jenn Gile has linked two clusters of npm malware back to North Korean hackers and their PolinRider campaign. [OpenSourceMalware]Operation Capsule Vault: And speaking of DPRK hacking campaigns, there's one spreading the RokRAT malware using edu- and academic-related phishing lures. [Genians]Contagious Interview campaign: There's nothing more dangerous right now than trying to find a job in the IT sector, thanks to North Korean hackers! Putting the irony aside, there's a new report on the Contagious Interview campaign that Elastic tracks as REF9403 activity. The report covers the use of SVG files to hide malicious commands via steganography, which is kind of original in its own specific way because SVG files haven't been broadly abused for steganography until now. [Elastic]Vulnerabilities, security research, and bug bountywp2shell vulnerability: The WordPress team has released a security update to patch one of the most critical bugs ever found in the project's code. The vulnerability is an SQL injection in the WordPress REST API that can be exploited by remote unauthenticated attackers to run malicious code on any WordPress site. The issue can be exploited without any preconditions and impacts all WordPress versions released since last December. WordPress sites power more than 41% of all internet sites. The bug was discovered by Searchlight Cyber and is tracked as CVE-2026-63030, or wp2shell. [Searchlight Cyber // wp2shell // WordPress patch]SourceHollowByte attack: A new vulnerability can crash OpenSSL servers using only an 11 bytes payload. The attack can be exploited by remote unauthenticated attackers and force servers to allocate huge amounts of memory before any secure TLS handshake even begins. The OpenSSL project released patches for both current and old library versions last month. The vulnerability was discovered by Okta and is named HollowByte. [Okta]Android lockscreen bypass: Just like Siri has been exploited for years to bypass the lockscreen, it's now Gemini's turn to be abused to bypass the Android lockscreen. [Android Headlines]Vulnerability disclosure guide: CISA and international partners have released joint guidance on establishing proper coordinated disclosure programs. [CISA]Nightmare Eclipse drops LegacyHive: Security researcher Nightmare Eclipse has released a new Windows exploit last week. Named LegacyHive, the zero-day is a local privilege escalation in the Windows User Profile Service. [Project Nightcrawler // GitHub // SecurityWeek]AoE RCE: The last thing you ever expected is probably a remote code execution exploit in the good ol' Age of Empires game. Here’s the Age of Empires RCE from yesterday’s Patch Tuesday: CVE-2026-50663.Join an attacker’s lobby, (auto-)accept UCG, and you get remote code execution. pic.twitter.com/QmMkY07C8S— Rick de Jager (@rdjgr) July 15, 2026 Infosec industryThreat/trend reports: Acronis, CompariTech, Moonlock, ReliaQuest, Sonatype, Sophos, Thales, and WatchGuard have recently published reports and summaries covering various threats and infosec industry trends.BSides Budapest 2026 videos: Talks from the BSides Budapest 2026 security conference, which took place in April, are available on YouTube. Risky Business podcastsIn this edition of Between Two Nerds, Tom Uren and The Grugq discuss just how important exploits are for cyber operations using data published in a new paper authored by two members of Ukraine’s cyber security agency. In this episode of Risky Business Features, James Wilson chats with SOCRadar CISO Ensar Seker and James Wilson chat about the company’s deep dive into the Fortibleed campaign. A small investigation into a curiously open directory on an unknown server expanded into the discovery of an attack that targeted 400,000 Fortinet devices.

blocks.html_en: A hacker has breached Romania's cadastre agency and wiped the country's entire land registry database following a failed extortion attempt.

sentences.en: A hacker has breached Romania's cadastre agency and wiped the country's entire land registry database following a failed extortion attempt.
sentences.zh: 一名黑客在勒索企图失败后入侵了罗马尼亚的地籍机构，并清除了该国的整个土地登记数据库。

blocks.html_en: The hack has brought Romania's entire real-estate market to a standstill as official apps and websites have been offline for a week. Notaries can't record new transactions while citizens can't obtain proof of ownership or detailed land records.

sentences.en: The hack has brought Romania's entire real-estate market to a standstill as official apps and websites have been offline for a week.
sentences.zh: 此次黑客攻击导致罗马尼亚整个房地产市场陷入停滞，官方应用程序和网站已离线一周。

sentences.en: Notaries can't record new transactions while citizens can't obtain proof of ownership or detailed land records.
sentences.zh: 公证人无法记录新交易，而公民无法获得所有权证明或详细的土地记录。

blocks.html_en: Email servers at the National Agency for Cadastre and Real Estate Advertising (Agenția Națională de Cadastru și Publicitate Imobiliară, or ANCPI) were also down as part of the incident.

sentences.en: Email servers at the National Agency for Cadastre and Real Estate Advertising (Agenția Națională de Cadastru și Publicitate Imobiliară, or ANCPI) were also down as part of the incident.
sentences.zh: 国家地籍和房地产广告局（Agenşia Nationala de Cadastre si Publicitate Imobiliàra，简称 ANCPI）的电子邮件服务器也因该事件而瘫痪。

blocks.html_en: Sources told Risky Business that the hacker entered using valid credentials, mapped internal systems, and wiped systems and backups after failing to extort the agency.

sentences.en: Sources told Risky Business that the hacker entered using valid credentials, mapped internal systems, and wiped systems and backups after failing to extort the agency.
sentences.zh: 消息人士告诉 Risky Business，黑客在勒索该机构失败后，使用有效凭据进入，映射内部系统，并擦除系统和备份。

blocks.html_en: The incident became public on July 14 as the hacker started deleting data. A day later, some of ANCPI's stolen data was put up for sale on a known hacking forum. The posted data included employee credentials, internal documents, and details on the agency's IT network.

sentences.en: The incident became public on July 14 as the hacker started deleting data.
sentences.zh: 随着黑客开始删除数据，该事件于 7 月 14 日被公开。

sentences.en: A day later, some of ANCPI's stolen data was put up for sale on a known hacking forum.
sentences.zh: 一天后，ANCPI 的一些被盗数据在一个已知的黑客论坛上出售。

sentences.en: The posted data included employee credentials, internal documents, and details on the agency's IT network.
sentences.zh: 发布的数据包括员工凭证、内部文件以及该机构 IT 网络的详细信息。

blocks.html_en: Since the hack, officials restored their website and posted a message announcing they are rebuilding the agency's entire network from scratch. Even if the hacker claims they deleted backups, the agency appears to have had an offline copy, otherwise things would have gotten really messy over the coming months in Romania.

sentences.en: Since the hack, officials restored their website and posted a message announcing they are rebuilding the agency's entire network from scratch.
sentences.zh: 黑客入侵后，官员们恢复了他们的网站，并发布消息宣布他们正在从头开始重建该机构的整个网络。

sentences.en: Even if the hacker claims they deleted backups, the agency appears to have had an offline copy, otherwise things would have gotten really messy over the coming months in Romania.
sentences.zh: 即使黑客声称他们删除了备份，该机构似乎也有一份离线副本，否则罗马尼亚未来几个月的事情将会变得非常混乱。

blocks.html_en: The stolen data was posted online by an account with the name ByteToBreach, a known hacker who also breached Sweden's e-government portal this year, and many other government agencies and high-profile companies over the past year.

sentences.en: The stolen data was posted online by an account with the name ByteToBreach, a known hacker who also breached Sweden's e-government portal this year, and many other government agencies and high-profile companies over the past year.
sentences.zh: 被盗数据是由一个名为 ByteToBreach 的帐户在网上发布的，该帐户是一位知名黑客，今年还入侵了瑞典的电子政府门户网站，并在过去的一年里入侵了许多其他政府机构和知名公司。

blocks.html_en: Security firm KELA published a profile on ByteToBreach last December and hinted they might be located in Algeria, but since the ANCPI hack has updated the post and outright doxxed the hacker as Zakaria Mahdjoub, an individual from Oran, Algeria.

sentences.en: Security firm KELA published a profile on ByteToBreach last December and hinted they might be located in Algeria, but since the ANCPI hack has updated the post and outright doxxed the hacker as Zakaria Mahdjoub, an individual from Oran, Algeria.
sentences.zh: 安全公司 KELA 去年 12 月在 ByteToBreach 上发布了一份个人资料，并暗示他们可能位于阿尔及利亚，但自从 ANCPI 黑客更新了该帖子，并彻底将黑客伪装成来自阿尔及利亚奥兰的 Zakaria Mahdjoub。

blocks.html_en: Well, that will make the job of Romanian law enforcement a hell lot easier! gj!

sentences.en: Well, that will make the job of Romanian law enforcement a hell lot easier!
sentences.zh: 好吧，这将使罗马尼亚执法的工作变得更加容易！

sentences.en: gj!
sentences.zh: 吉杰！

blocks.html_en: Hugging Face hacked using AI: A threat actor used an autonomous AI agent to breach AI platform Hugging Face last week. The attacker used exploits in the platform's data-processing pipeline to pivot to some parts of the company's internal systems. Hugging Face says no customer data was exposed but the attacker stole internal datasets and some cloud credentials. Hugging Face says it tried to use a frontier AI model to analyze the hack but was blocked by its guardrails, which couldn't differentiate between an IR event and offensive operations. [Hugging Face]

sentences.en: Hugging Face hacked using AI: A threat actor used an autonomous AI agent to breach AI platform Hugging Face last week.
sentences.zh: Hugging Face 使用 AI 进行黑客攻击：上周，一名威胁行为者使用自主 AI 代理入侵了 AI 平台 Hugging Face。

sentences.en: The attacker used exploits in the platform's data-processing pipeline to pivot to some parts of the company's internal systems.
sentences.zh: 攻击者利用平台数据处理管道中的漏洞攻击公司内部系统的某些部分。

sentences.en: Hugging Face says no customer data was exposed but the attacker stole internal datasets and some cloud credentials.
sentences.zh: Hugging Face 表示，没有暴露任何客户数据，但攻击者窃取了内部数据集和一些云凭据。

sentences.en: Hugging Face says it tried to use a frontier AI model to analyze the hack but was blocked by its guardrails, which couldn't differentiate between an IR event and offensive operations. [Hugging Face]
sentences.zh: Hugging Face 表示，它试图使用前沿人工智能模型来分析此次黑客攻击，但被其防护栏挡住了，该模型无法区分红外事件和攻击性操作。 [抱脸]

blocks.html_en: Coca-Cola hit by ransomware: Coca-Cola has suspended production at its Fairlife dairy subsidiary after a ransomware attack. In an SEC filing, Coca-Cola said hackers accessed Fairlife production-related systems this week. Production has been halted at Fairlife US factories. The company's Canadian production lines were unaffected. No ransomware group has taken credit for the incident, yet. [SEC // TechCrunch]

blocks.html_en: Qantas breach has a cause: The hack of Australian airline company Qantas last year was traced back to a social engineering attack. Hackers called an overseas contractor posing as the Qantas IT team to access their systems, connect to the Qantas CRM platform, and exfiltrate the data of 5.7 million customers. Australia's Information Commissioner says Qantas took all the steps to protect customer data on its side and will not be opening further probes into the hack. [OAIC]

sentences.en: Qantas breach has a cause: The hack of Australian airline company Qantas last year was traced back to a social engineering attack.
sentences.zh: 澳洲航空的违规行为是有原因的：去年澳大利亚航空公司澳洲航空遭受的黑客攻击可追溯到社交工程攻击。

sentences.en: Hackers called an overseas contractor posing as the Qantas IT team to access their systems, connect to the Qantas CRM platform, and exfiltrate the data of 5.7 million customers.
sentences.zh: 黑客致电冒充澳洲航空 IT 团队的海外承包商访问其系统，连接至澳洲航空 CRM 平台，并窃取 570 万客户的数据。

sentences.en: Australia's Information Commissioner says Qantas took all the steps to protect customer data on its side and will not be opening further probes into the hack. [OAIC]
sentences.zh: 澳大利亚信息专员表示，澳洲航空已采取一切措施保护客户数据，并且不会对此次黑客攻击展开进一步调查。 [OAIC]

blocks.html_en: Suno hack: A threat actor hacked AI music generator platform Suno and dumped internal files and documents online. The files allegedly show that Suno scraped millions of songs and lyrics from YouTube Music, Deezer, Genius, and other music platforms. The leaked files include source code and detailed scraping instructions targeting the platforms. Several music industry groups have sued Suno over the past year for training its AI song generator tool on copyrighted material. Suno was allegedly hacked following a compromise with the Shai-Hulud npm worm. [404 Media // The Verge]

sentences.en: Suno hack: A threat actor hacked AI music generator platform Suno and dumped internal files and documents online.
sentences.zh: Suno 黑客攻击：威胁行为者入侵了 AI 音乐生成器平台 Suno 并将内部文件和文档转储到网上。

sentences.en: The files allegedly show that Suno scraped millions of songs and lyrics from YouTube Music, Deezer, Genius, and other music platforms.
sentences.zh: 据称，这些文件显示 Suno 从 YouTube Music、Deezer、Genius 和其他音乐平台上抓取了数百万首歌曲和歌词。

sentences.en: The leaked files include source code and detailed scraping instructions targeting the platforms.
sentences.zh: 泄露的文件包括源代码和针对平台的详细抓取说明。

sentences.en: Several music industry groups have sued Suno over the past year for training its AI song generator tool on copyrighted material.
sentences.zh: 去年，多家音乐产业集团起诉 Suno，指控其使用受版权保护的材料训练其人工智能歌曲生成器工具。

sentences.en: Suno was allegedly hacked following a compromise with the Shai-Hulud npm worm. [404 Media // The Verge]
sentences.zh: 据称，Suno 在受到 Shai-Hulud npm 蠕虫攻击后遭到黑客攻击。 [404媒体//边缘]

blocks.html_en: WINDTRE fined for breaches: Italy's privacy watchdog has fined telecommunications provider WINDTRE €1.7 million for "serious security deficiencies" that led to two security breaches last year. [GPDP]

sentences.en: WINDTRE fined for breaches: Italy's privacy watchdog has fined telecommunications provider WINDTRE €1.7 million for "serious security deficiencies" that led to two security breaches last year. [GPDP]
sentences.zh: WINDTRE 因违规行为被罚款：意大利隐私监管机构对电信提供商 WINDTRE 处以 170 万欧元的罚款，理由是“严重的安全缺陷”，导致去年发生了两次安全漏洞。 [国内生产总值]

blocks.html_en: KNPP leak: Threat intel analyst Rakesh Krishnan looks at a leak of sensitive files from India's KNPP nuclear power plant after one of its contractors got hit by the World Leaks extortion group. [The Raven File]

sentences.en: KNPP leak: Threat intel analyst Rakesh Krishnan looks at a leak of sensitive files from India's KNPP nuclear power plant after one of its contractors got hit by the World Leaks extortion group. [The Raven File]
sentences.zh: KNPP 泄密：威胁情报分析师拉克什·克里希南 (Rakesh Krishnan) 正在研究印度 KNPP 核电站的一名承包商遭到“世界泄密”勒索组织袭击后泄露的敏感文件。 [乌鸦档案]

blocks.html_en: Ostium crypto-heist: The Ostium DeFi platform was hacked for $18 million last week after hackers exploited its own price-reporting infrastructure. [CoinDesk]

sentences.en: Ostium crypto-heist: The Ostium DeFi platform was hacked for $18 million last week after hackers exploited its own price-reporting infrastructure. [CoinDesk]
sentences.zh: Ostium 加密货币盗窃案：上周，Ostium DeFi 平台在黑客利用其自身的价格报告基础设施后遭到黑客攻击，损失达 1800 万美元。 [币台]

blocks.html_en: Estée Lauder discloses Oracle EBS breach: Cosmetics giant Estée Lauder has confirmed that hackers stole customer data from its Oracle E-Business Suite platform last year. The company disclosed the breach to US state officials almost a year after it took place. This is Estée's second breach after another one in 2023. The Clop hacking group is behind the hacking spree that targeted Oracle EBS servers. [California OAG]

sentences.en: Estée Lauder discloses Oracle EBS breach: Cosmetics giant Estée Lauder has confirmed that hackers stole customer data from its Oracle E-Business Suite platform last year.
sentences.zh: 雅诗兰黛披露 Oracle EBS 漏洞：化妆品巨头雅诗兰黛已证实黑客去年从其 Oracle E-Business Suite 平台窃取了客户数据。

sentences.en: The company disclosed the breach to US state officials almost a year after it took place.
sentences.zh: 该公司在事件发生近一年后向美国政府官员披露了这一事件。

sentences.en: This is Estée's second breach after another one in 2023.
sentences.zh: 这是继 2023 年发生另一起违规事件之后，雅诗兰黛第二次违规。

sentences.en: The Clop hacking group is behind the hacking spree that targeted Oracle EBS servers. [California OAG]
sentences.zh: Clop 黑客组织是针对 Oracle EBS 服务器的黑客热潮的幕后黑手。 [加州 OAG]

blocks.html_en: Ernst & Young also discloses breach: Accounting and risk management giant Ernst & Young also disclosed a breach, but the disclosure has been so sanitized of any info that I can't tell what's this about. [California OAG]

sentences.en: Ernst & Young also discloses breach: Accounting and risk management giant Ernst & Young also disclosed a breach, but the disclosure has been so sanitized of any info that I can't tell what's this about. [California OAG]
sentences.zh: 安永会计师事务所也披露了违规行为：会计和风险管理巨头安永会计师事务所也披露了一项违规行为，但披露的任何信息都经过了严格的过滤，我无法分辨出这是关于什么的。 [加州 OAG]

blocks.html_en: DigiCert breach linked to CylindricalCanine: Security firm Expel has linked the hack of certificate authority DigiCert to CylindricalCanine, a sub-group of GoldenEyeDog, a financially motivated group operating out of China. [Expel]

sentences.en: DigiCert breach linked to CylindricalCanine: Security firm Expel has linked the hack of certificate authority DigiCert to CylindricalCanine, a sub-group of GoldenEyeDog, a financially motivated group operating out of China. [Expel]
sentences.zh: DigiCert 泄露事件与 CylindricalCanine 相关：安全公司 Expel 已将证书颁发机构 DigiCert 的黑客攻击与 CylindricalCanine 关联起来，CylindricalCanine 是 GoldenEyeDog 的一个子组织，而 GoldenEyeDog 是一家在中国境外运营的出于经济动机的组织。 [驱逐]

blocks.html_en: General tech and privacy

sentences.en: General tech and privacy
sentences.zh: 一般技术和隐私

blocks.html_en: Ofcom opens TikTok inquiry: The UK's communications watchdog has opened a formal investigation into TikTok for failing to protect children from harmful content on the platform, as per the UK's Online Safety Act. [Ofcom]

sentences.en: Ofcom opens TikTok inquiry: The UK's communications watchdog has opened a formal investigation into TikTok for failing to protect children from harmful content on the platform, as per the UK's Online Safety Act. [Ofcom]
sentences.zh: Ofcom 对 TikTok 展开调查：英国通信监管机构已对 TikTok 展开正式调查，原因是 TikTok 未能根据英国《在线安全法》保护儿童免受平台上有害内容的侵害。 [英国通信管理局]

blocks.html_en: Moonshot releases Kimi K3: Chinese AI startup Moonshot has unveiled a new AI model named Kimi K3, which the company claims can rival the ones from top American firms like Anthropic and OpenAI. [Kimi // Business Insider]

sentences.en: Moonshot releases Kimi K3: Chinese AI startup Moonshot has unveiled a new AI model named Kimi K3, which the company claims can rival the ones from top American firms like Anthropic and OpenAI. [Kimi // Business Insider]
sentences.zh: Moonshot发布Kimi K3：中国人工智能初创公司Moonshot推出了一款名为Kimi K3的新人工智能模型，该公司声称该模型可以与Anthropic和OpenAI等美国顶级公司的模型相媲美。 [基米//商业内幕]

blocks.html_en: Rust in Chromium: Microsoft is working on adding a Rust-based PNG image decoder in the Chromium browser project, a more secure component for processing PNG images for Chrome, Edge, Opera, and other similar browsers. [Microsoft]

sentences.en: Rust in Chromium: Microsoft is working on adding a Rust-based PNG image decoder in the Chromium browser project, a more secure component for processing PNG images for Chrome, Edge, Opera, and other similar browsers. [Microsoft]
sentences.zh: Chromium 中的 Rust：微软正致力于在 Chromium 浏览器项目中添加基于 Rust 的 PNG 图像解码器，这是一个更安全的组件，用于为 Chrome、Edge、Opera 和其他类似浏览器处理 PNG 图像。 [微软]

blocks.html_en: EU password manager has ties to Russia: An investigation has revealed that Spain-based password manager Passwork shares its codebase and a "near-identical user manual" with a similarly-named password manager advertised in Russia. The Spanish version has allegedly been receiving software updates from an UAE firm managed by one of Passwork's Russian co-founders. The Spanish Passwork's customer list includes European government agencies and universities, which raises concerns of espionage. [OCCRP]

sentences.en: EU password manager has ties to Russia: An investigation has revealed that Spain-based password manager Passwork shares its codebase and a "near-identical user manual" with a similarly-named password manager advertised in Russia.
sentences.zh: 欧盟密码管理器与俄罗斯有联系：一项调查显示，总部位于西班牙的密码管理器 Passwork 与在俄罗斯宣传的同名密码管理器共享其代码库和“几乎相同的用户手册”。

sentences.en: The Spanish version has allegedly been receiving software updates from an UAE firm managed by one of Passwork's Russian co-founders.
sentences.zh: 据称，西班牙语版本一直在从 Passwork 的俄罗斯联合创始人之一管理的一家阿联酋公司接收软件更新。

sentences.en: The Spanish Passwork's customer list includes European government agencies and universities, which raises concerns of espionage. [OCCRP]
sentences.zh: 西班牙 Passwork 的客户名单包括欧洲政府机构和大学，这引起了间谍活动的担忧。 [OCCRP]

blocks.html_en: India fines HP over cartel practices: The Indian government fined HP $14.4 million over cartel practices after the company colluded with resellers to fix prices for ink cartridges, toner, and other printing supplies in government contract bids. [ArsTechnica]

sentences.en: India fines HP over cartel practices: The Indian government fined HP $14.4 million over cartel practices after the company colluded with resellers to fix prices for ink cartridges, toner, and other printing supplies in government contract bids. [ArsTechnica]
sentences.zh: 印度因卡特尔行为对惠普处以罚款：在该公司与经销商串通在政府合同投标中操纵墨盒、碳粉和其他打印耗材的价格后，印度政府因卡特尔行为对惠普处以 1,440 万美元的罚款。 [ArsTechnica]

blocks.html_en: SanFran CAO cracks down on nudify apps: The San Francisco City Attorney's Office has sent cease-and-desist letters to Apple and Google and ordered the tech giants to remove AI nudify apps from their stores and stop indirectly profiting from CSAM. [WIRED]

sentences.en: SanFran CAO cracks down on nudify apps: The San Francisco City Attorney's Office has sent cease-and-desist letters to Apple and Google and ordered the tech giants to remove AI nudify apps from their stores and stop indirectly profiting from CSAM. [WIRED]
sentences.zh: 旧金山 CAO 严厉打击裸体应用程序：旧金山市检察官办公室已向苹果和谷歌发出停止函，并命令科技巨头从其商店中删除人工智能裸体应用程序，并停止从 CSAM 间接获利。 [有线]

sentences.zh: 来源

sentences.en: Government, politics, and policy
sentences.zh: 政府、政治和政策

blocks.html_en: Morocco confirmed as NSO customer: A whistleblower and former member of Morocco’s domestic intelligence service has confirmed their government's access to the NSO Pegasus spyware, contrary to the government's past public denials. The tool was heavily used to spy on dissidents, journalists, and even politicians abroad. [OCCRP // Forbidden Stories]

sentences.en: Morocco confirmed as NSO customer: A whistleblower and former member of Morocco’s domestic intelligence service has confirmed their government's access to the NSO Pegasus spyware, contrary to the government's past public denials.
sentences.zh: 摩洛哥确认为 NSO 客户：摩洛哥国内情报部门的一名举报人和前成员证实，该国政府能够访问 NSO Pegasus 间谍软件，这与政府过去的公开否认相反。

sentences.en: The tool was heavily used to spy on dissidents, journalists, and even politicians abroad. [OCCRP // Forbidden Stories]
sentences.zh: 该工具被大量用于监视异见人士、记者，甚至国外的政客。 [OCCRP // 禁忌故事]

blocks.html_en: UK scraps digital ID scheme: The UK government will scrap a proposed digital ID scheme once its new prime minister Andy Burnham takes office on Monday. The scheme was announced last September and was supposed to enter into effect next year. It involved issuing a digital ID for UK citizens and legal residents in the form of a mobile app. The ID was meant to serve as proof for the Right to Work in the UK. [Reuters]

sentences.en: UK scraps digital ID scheme: The UK government will scrap a proposed digital ID scheme once its new prime minister Andy Burnham takes office on Monday.
sentences.zh: 英国废除数字身份证计划：一旦新首相安迪·伯纳姆周一上任，英国政府将废除拟议的数字身份证计划。

sentences.en: The scheme was announced last September and was supposed to enter into effect next year.
sentences.zh: 该计划于去年九月宣布，预计明年生效。

sentences.en: It involved issuing a digital ID for UK citizens and legal residents in the form of a mobile app.
sentences.zh: 它涉及以移动应用程序的形式为英国公民和合法居民发放数字身份证。

sentences.en: The ID was meant to serve as proof for the Right to Work in the UK. [Reuters]
sentences.zh: 该身份证旨在作为在英国工作权利的证明。 [路透社]

blocks.html_en: US govt fails to rotate cyber personnel: The US government failed to follow through with one of its own programs to rotate cybersecurity employees between federal agencies. Only eight employees participated in the program since 2022. The program was meant to teach employees new skills before returning to their native agencies. [GAO // Cyberscoop]

sentences.en: US govt fails to rotate cyber personnel: The US government failed to follow through with one of its own programs to rotate cybersecurity employees between federal agencies.
sentences.zh: 美国政府未能实施网络人员轮换：美国政府未能实施自己的一项在联邦机构之间轮换网络安全员工的计划。

sentences.en: Only eight employees participated in the program since 2022.
sentences.zh: 自 2022 年以来，只有 8 名员工参与了该计划。

sentences.en: The program was meant to teach employees new skills before returning to their native agencies. [GAO // Cyberscoop]
sentences.zh: 该计划的目的是在员工返回原机构之前向他们传授新技能。 [高//网络独家]

blocks.html_en: White House announces Gold Eagle program: The Trump administration has launched a new program to help coordinate the disclosure and patching of vulnerabilities in open-source projects and critical infrastructure. The new Gold Eagle program was designed to receive bug reports at scale, usually found using AI tools and frontier AI models. CISA, the Treasury Department, and the Pentagon are involved in the program. [White House]

sentences.en: White House announces Gold Eagle program: The Trump administration has launched a new program to help coordinate the disclosure and patching of vulnerabilities in open-source projects and critical infrastructure.
sentences.zh: 白宫宣布金鹰计划：特朗普政府启动了一项新计划，帮助协调开源项目和关键基础设施漏洞的披露和修补。

sentences.en: The new Gold Eagle program was designed to receive bug reports at scale, usually found using AI tools and frontier AI models.
sentences.zh: 新的金鹰计划旨在大规模接收错误报告，这些错误报告通常是使用人工智能工具和前沿人工智能模型发现的。

sentences.en: CISA, the Treasury Department, and the Pentagon are involved in the program. [White House]
sentences.zh: CISA、财政部和五角大楼都参与了该计划。 [白宫]

blocks.html_en: France bans Polymarket: The French government has ordered internet service providers to block access to prediction market betting platform Polymarket. The French regulatory authority formally banned the platform in 2024 and threatened fines of up to €200,000 for French citizens placing bets on the platform. The agency moved into active enforcement after data showed Polymarket's userbase grew in France despite the ban. Spain also banned Polymarket in May. [Engadget]

sentences.en: France bans Polymarket: The French government has ordered internet service providers to block access to prediction market betting platform Polymarket.
sentences.zh: 法国禁止 Polymarket：法国政府已命令互联网服务提供商阻止访问预测市场博彩平台 Polymarket。

sentences.en: The French regulatory authority formally banned the platform in 2024 and threatened fines of up to €200,000 for French citizens placing bets on the platform.
sentences.zh: 法国监管机构于 2024 年正式禁止该平台，并威胁对在该平台下注的法国公民处以最高 20 万欧元的罚款。

sentences.en: The agency moved into active enforcement after data showed Polymarket's userbase grew in France despite the ban.
sentences.zh: 数据显示，尽管有禁令，Polymarket 在法国的用户群仍在增长，该机构开始积极执法。

sentences.en: Spain also banned Polymarket in May. [Engadget]
sentences.zh: 西班牙五月份也禁止了 Polymarket。 [Engadget]

blocks.html_en: In this Risky Business sponsor interview, Casey Ellis chats with Haroon Meer from Thinkst about building companies customers don’t hate. Haroon explains why Thinkst still offers Canary tokens for free and why it has avoided annual price hikes on its paid products. They talk about Eric Ries’s “Incorruptible”, Rob Lee’s 100-year-company approach at Dragos, and why keeping customers happy is a better business strategy than chasing easy sugar highs.

sentences.en: In this Risky Business sponsor interview, Casey Ellis chats with Haroon Meer from Thinkst about building companies customers don’t hate.
sentences.zh: 在这次《Risky Business》赞助商采访中，Casey Ellis 与 Thinkst 的 Haroon Meer 讨论了如何打造客户不讨厌的公司。

sentences.en: Haroon explains why Thinkst still offers Canary tokens for free and why it has avoided annual price hikes on its paid products.
sentences.zh: Haroon 解释了为什么 Thinkst 仍然免费提供 Canary 代币，以及为什么它避免了付费产品的年度价格上涨。

sentences.en: They talk about Eric Ries’s “Incorruptible”, Rob Lee’s 100-year-company approach at Dragos, and why keeping customers happy is a better business strategy than chasing easy sugar highs.
sentences.zh: 他们谈论埃里克·里斯 (Eric Ries) 的“廉洁”、罗伯·李 (Rob Lee) 在 Dragos 的 100 年公司方针，以及为什么让顾客满意是比追求简单的糖瘾更好的商业策略。

sentences.zh: 逮捕、网络犯罪和威胁情报

blocks.html_en: Graykey maker sues employee for leaking exploit: Graykey-maker Magnet Forensics has sued a former employee for allegedly leaking details about a proprietary iPhone exploit. Magnet claims Mario Del Gaudio shared details of the exploit with his new employer and rival company Paradigm Shift. The exploit was tracked internally at Magnet as MSG but was disclosed publicly by Paradigm Shift in a blog post as usbliter8. The exploit allows attackers to run malicious code inside the SecureROM of Apple devices using A12 and A13 chips. It is a hardware bug and unpatchable. [Bloomberg // CourtListener // usbliter8 blog post]

sentences.en: Graykey maker sues employee for leaking exploit: Graykey-maker Magnet Forensics has sued a former employee for allegedly leaking details about a proprietary iPhone exploit.
sentences.zh: Graykey 制造商起诉员工泄露漏洞：Graykey 制造商 Magnet Forensics 起诉一名前员工，指控其泄露有关 iPhone 专有漏洞的详细信息。

sentences.en: Magnet claims Mario Del Gaudio shared details of the exploit with his new employer and rival company Paradigm Shift.
sentences.zh: Magnet 声称 Mario Del Gaudio 与他的新雇主和竞争对手公司 Paradigm Shift 分享了该漏洞的详细信息。

sentences.en: The exploit was tracked internally at Magnet as MSG but was disclosed publicly by Paradigm Shift in a blog post as usbliter8.
sentences.zh: 该漏洞在 Magnet 内部被追踪为 MSG，但由 Paradigm Shift 在博客文章中公开披露为 usbliter8。

sentences.en: The exploit allows attackers to run malicious code inside the SecureROM of Apple devices using A12 and A13 chips.
sentences.zh: 该漏洞允许攻击者在使用 A12 和 A13 芯片的 Apple 设备的 SecureROM 内运行恶意代码。

sentences.en: It is a hardware bug and unpatchable. [Bloomberg // CourtListener // usbliter8 blog post]
sentences.zh: 这是一个硬件错误并且无法修补。 [Bloomberg // CourtListener // usbliter8 博客文章]

blocks.html_en: TfL hackers get five years: A UK judge has sentenced two members of the Scattered Spider hacking group to 5.5 years in prison each. Thalha Jubair and Owen Flowers pleaded guilty last month to hacking the London public transport authority in August of 2024. The hack caused months of disruptions at Transport for London and caused damages of £39 million. Jubair is also charged in the US with hacking and extorting 47 US companies and allegedly seeking ransoms of at least $115 million. [NCA]

sentences.en: TfL hackers get five years: A UK judge has sentenced two members of the Scattered Spider hacking group to 5.5 years in prison each.
sentences.zh: 伦敦交通局黑客被判五年徒刑：一名英国法官判处 Scattered Spider 黑客组织的两名成员每人 5.5 年监禁。

sentences.en: Thalha Jubair and Owen Flowers pleaded guilty last month to hacking the London public transport authority in August of 2024.
sentences.zh: Thalha Jubair 和 Owen Flowers 上个月承认在 2024 年 8 月对伦敦公共交通管理局进行了黑客攻击。

sentences.en: The hack caused months of disruptions at Transport for London and caused damages of £39 million.
sentences.zh: 这次黑客攻击给伦敦交通局造成了数月的中断，并造成了 3900 万英镑的损失。

sentences.en: Jubair is also charged in the US with hacking and extorting 47 US companies and allegedly seeking ransoms of at least $115 million. [NCA]
sentences.zh: Jubair 在美国还被指控对 47 家美国公司进行黑客攻击和勒索，据称勒索至少 1.15 亿美元的赎金。 [NCA]

blocks.html_en: REvil hacker arrested in Armenia: Armenian authorities have arrested a suspected member of the REvil ransomware group. Alexander Ermakov was arrested at the Yerevan airport at the end of June on an Interpol arrest warrant. A man named Alexander Ermakov is the main suspect behind the ransomware attack on Australia's Medibank insurer in 2022. Russian media claims that Armenian authorities arrested a man with the same name and that the real Ermakov is in Russia, where he is serving a restriction of freedom sentence that prevents him from traveling abroad. [RIA Novosti // Risky Business]

sentences.en: REvil hacker arrested in Armenia: Armenian authorities have arrested a suspected member of the REvil ransomware group.
sentences.zh: REvil 黑客在亚美尼亚被捕：亚美尼亚当局逮捕了 REvil 勒索软件组织的一名疑似成员。

sentences.en: Alexander Ermakov was arrested at the Yerevan airport at the end of June on an Interpol arrest warrant.

sentences.en: A man named Alexander Ermakov is the main suspect behind the ransomware attack on Australia's Medibank insurer in 2022.
sentences.zh: 一位名叫 Alexander Ermakov 的男子是 2022 年针对澳大利亚 Medibank 保险公司的勒索软件攻击的主要嫌疑人。

sentences.en: Russian media claims that Armenian authorities arrested a man with the same name and that the real Ermakov is in Russia, where he is serving a restriction of freedom sentence that prevents him from traveling abroad. [RIA Novosti // Risky Business]
sentences.zh: 俄罗斯媒体声称，亚美尼亚当局逮捕了一名同名男子，真正的叶尔马科夫在俄罗斯，正在俄罗斯服限制自由刑，禁止他出国旅行。 [俄新社//危险的生意]

blocks.html_en: Scam center dismantled in Timor-Leste: Police in Timor-Leste have raided three cyber scam compounds in the capital city of Dili. Police arrested 253 suspects, with most being Chinese and Indonesian nationals. Authorities also raided another compound last month. [ABC]

sentences.zh: 当局上个月还突袭了另一处院落。 [ABC]

blocks.html_en: GTA hacker released from hospital, sent to prison: A member of the Lapsus$ hacking group has been released from a secure hospital and transferred to a normal prison in the UK. Arion Kurtaj is set to face trial again for hacking Rockstar Games in 2022 and releasing GTA5 source code and GTA6 gameplay. Kurtaj was diagnosed with severe autism and sentenced to an indefinite hospital order in December 2023. [GameRant // Polygon]

sentences.en: GTA hacker released from hospital, sent to prison: A member of the Lapsus$ hacking group has been released from a secure hospital and transferred to a normal prison in the UK.

blocks.html_en: UAT-11795 profile: Cisco is tracking a new e-crime group targeting companies in the US and Europe with the Starland RAT and a command-and-control (C2) memory implant named the WLDR Agent. [Cisco Talos]

blocks.html_en: TAG-150 evolution: eSentire has published details on the changes to the tradecraft of TAG-150, an e-crime group behind the CastleLoader, CastleBot, and CastleRAT malware strains—also tracked as DinDoor, a Deno-based loader, NightshadeC2, and DenoRAT, a Deno-based Remote Access Trojan (RAT). The biggest change is their adoption of ClickFix, everyone's favorite infection vector. [eSentire]

sentences.en: TAG-150 evolution: eSentire has published details on the changes to the tradecraft of TAG-150, an e-crime group behind the CastleLoader, CastleBot, and CastleRAT malware strains—also tracked as DinDoor, a Deno-based loader, NightshadeC2, and DenoRAT, a Deno-based Remote Access Trojan (RAT).
sentences.zh: TAG-150 演变：eSentire 发布了 TAG-150 交易技术变化的详细信息，TAG-150 是 CastleLoader、CastleBot 和 CastleRAT 恶意软件菌株背后的电子犯罪组织，也被追踪为 DinDoor（基于 Deno 的加载程序）、NightshadeC2 和 DenoRAT（基于 Deno 的远程访问木马 (RAT)）。

sentences.en: The biggest change is their adoption of ClickFix, everyone's favorite infection vector. [eSentire]
sentences.zh: 最大的变化是他们采用了 ClickFix，这是每个人最喜欢的感染媒介。 [电子传感器]

blocks.html_en: More ViPNeT exploitation in Russia: A hacking group is planting backdoors inside Russian companies using the ViPNet enterprise VPN software. The attackers first compromise one VPN node and then exploit the software's update mechanism to install the backdoor on the whole network. ViPNet owner Infotecs has confirmed the attacks and released security updates. A similar wave of attacks also took place in April last year. [Infotecs // PositiveTechnologies // Kaspersky // Last year's attacks]

blocks.html_en: Scarcity scams are here to stay: Scarcity scams are a new category of online scams where threat actors run fake sites for online services with limited availability or spots. This type of scam has exploded across the past few years and typically target the reservation sites of various government websites across the world. [DomainTools]

blocks.html_en: UTA0533 is behind new SonicWall zero-day wave: A hacking group tracked as UTA0533 is behind two zero-days exploited in SonicWall SMA appliances. The zero-days include an SSRF and a code injection vulnerability that grant the group root-level access to the device. The attacks began in late June and are deploying malware designed specifically for SonicWall SMA VPN appliances. SonicWall released patches for both zero-days last week. [Volexity // SonicWall patches]

content_html_zh:
本新闻稿由深受喜爱的 Thinkst Canary 的制造商 Thinkst 为您带来。 您可以通过在 podcatcher 中搜索“Risky Business”或通过此 RSS 源订阅，以播客形式订阅此新闻通讯的音频版本。 您还可以通过此处将“风险商业”时事通讯作为首选来源添加到您的 Google 搜索结果中。

一名黑客在勒索企图失败后入侵了罗马尼亚的地籍机构，并清除了该国的整个土地登记数据库。

此次黑客攻击导致罗马尼亚整个房地产市场陷入停滞，官方应用程序和网站已离线一周。 公证人无法记录新交易，而公民无法获得所有权证明或详细的土地记录。

国家地籍和房地产广告局（Agenşia Nationala de Cadastre si Publicitate Imobiliàra，简称 ANCPI）的电子邮件服务器也因该事件而瘫痪。

消息人士告诉 Risky Business，黑客在勒索该机构失败后，使用有效凭据进入，映射内部系统，并擦除系统和备份。

随着黑客开始删除数据，该事件于 7 月 14 日被公开。 一天后，ANCPI 的一些被盗数据在一个已知的黑客论坛上出售。 发布的数据包括员工凭证、内部文件以及该机构 IT 网络的详细信息。

黑客入侵后，官员们恢复了他们的网站，并发布消息宣布他们正在从头开始重建该机构的整个网络。 即使黑客声称他们删除了备份，该机构似乎也有一份离线副本，否则罗马尼亚未来几个月的事情将会变得非常混乱。

被盗数据是由一个名为 ByteToBreach 的帐户在网上发布的，该帐户是一位知名黑客，今年还入侵了瑞典的电子政府门户网站，并在过去的一年里入侵了许多其他政府机构和知名公司。

安全公司 KELA 去年 12 月在 ByteToBreach 上发布了一份个人资料，并暗示他们可能位于阿尔及利亚，但自从 ANCPI 黑客更新了该帖子，并彻底将黑客伪装成来自阿尔及利亚奥兰的 Zakaria Mahdjoub。

好吧，这将使罗马尼亚执法的工作变得更加容易！ 吉杰！

罗马尼亚加入了波兰、斯洛伐克、希腊、摩洛哥、俄罗斯和乌克兰的行列，成为土地登记机构在过去三年遭到黑客攻击的国家。

有风险的商业播客

在本期《严重风险业务》中，Tom Uren 和 James Wilson 讨论了勒索软件组织利用人工智能的不同方式。 相对较新的 FulcrumSec 组织使用简单的技术来破坏公司，然后使用人工智能在勒索谈判中对受害者获得更多影响力。

违规、黑客攻击和安全事件

Hugging Face 使用 AI 进行黑客攻击：上周，一名威胁行为者使用自主 AI 代理入侵了 AI 平台 Hugging Face。 攻击者利用平台数据处理管道中的漏洞攻击公司内部系统的某些部分。 Hugging Face 表示，没有暴露任何客户数据，但攻击者窃取了内部数据集和一些云凭据。 Hugging Face 表示，它试图使用前沿人工智能模型来分析此次黑客攻击，但被其防护栏挡住了，该模型无法区分红外事件和攻击性操作。 [抱脸]

HuggingFace 被人工智能攻击了。 让我印象深刻的是护栏不对称。 攻击者没有受到任何限制，但 HF 的响应与滥用护栏发生冲突，迫使他们意外转向本地模型。 IR 计划的另一个方面。 Huggingface.co/blog/securit...[图片或嵌入]— David J. 比安科 (@davidjbianco.bsky.social) 2026 年 7 月 17 日晚上 10:59

可口可乐遭受勒索软件攻击：在遭受勒索软件攻击后，可口可乐已暂停其 Fairlife 乳制品子公司的生产。 可口可乐在美国证券交易委员会的一份文件中表示，黑客本周访问了 Fairlife 生产相关系统。 Fairlife 美国工厂已停止生产。 该公司的加拿大生产线未受影响。 目前还没有勒索软件组织承认此次事件是造成的。 [SEC // TechCrunch]

澳洲航空的违规行为是有原因的：去年澳大利亚航空公司澳洲航空遭受的黑客攻击可追溯到社交工程攻击。 黑客致电冒充澳洲航空 IT 团队的海外承包商访问其系统，连接至澳洲航空 CRM 平台，并窃取 570 万客户的数据。 澳大利亚信息专员表示，澳洲航空已采取一切措施保护客户数据，并且不会对此次黑客攻击展开进一步调查。 [OAIC]

Suno 黑客攻击：威胁行为者入侵了 AI 音乐生成器平台 Suno 并将内部文件和文档转储到网上。 据称，这些文件显示 Suno 从 YouTube Music、Deezer、Genius 和其他音乐平台上抓取了数百万首歌曲和歌词。 泄露的文件包括源代码和针对平台的详细抓取说明。 去年，多家音乐产业集团起诉 Suno，指控其使用受版权保护的材料训练其人工智能歌曲生成器工具。 据称，Suno 在受到 Shai-Hulud npm 蠕虫攻击后遭到黑客攻击。 [404媒体//边缘]

WINDTRE 因违规行为被罚款：意大利隐私监管机构对电信提供商 WINDTRE 处以 170 万欧元的罚款，理由是“严重的安全缺陷”，导致去年发生了两次安全漏洞。 [国内生产总值]

KNPP 泄密：威胁情报分析师拉克什·克里希南 (Rakesh Krishnan) 正在研究印度 KNPP 核电站的一名承包商遭到“世界泄密”勒索组织袭击后泄露的敏感文件。 [乌鸦档案]

Ostium 加密货币盗窃案：上周，Ostium DeFi 平台在黑客利用其自身的价格报告基础设施后遭到黑客攻击，损失达 1800 万美元。 [币台]

雅诗兰黛披露 Oracle EBS 漏洞：化妆品巨头雅诗兰黛已证实黑客去年从其 Oracle E-Business Suite 平台窃取了客户数据。 该公司在事件发生近一年后向美国政府官员披露了这一事件。 这是继 2023 年发生另一起违规事件之后，雅诗兰黛第二次违规。 Clop 黑客组织是针对 Oracle EBS 服务器的黑客热潮的幕后黑手。 [加州 OAG]

安永会计师事务所也披露了违规行为：会计和风险管理巨头安永会计师事务所也披露了一项违规行为，但披露的任何信息都经过了严格的过滤，我无法分辨出这是关于什么的。 [加州 OAG]

DigiCert 泄露事件与 CylindricalCanine 相关：安全公司 Expel 已将证书颁发机构 DigiCert 的黑客攻击与 CylindricalCanine 关联起来，CylindricalCanine 是 GoldenEyeDog 的一个子组织，而 GoldenEyeDog 是一家在中国境外运营的出于经济动机的组织。 [驱逐]

一般技术和隐私

Ofcom 对 TikTok 展开调查：英国通信监管机构已对 TikTok 展开正式调查，原因是 TikTok 未能根据英国《在线安全法》保护儿童免受平台上有害内容的侵害。 [英国通信管理局]

Moonshot发布Kimi K3：中国人工智能初创公司Moonshot推出了一款名为Kimi K3的新人工智能模型，该公司声称该模型可以与Anthropic和OpenAI等美国顶级公司的模型相媲美。 [基米//商业内幕]

Chromium 中的 Rust：微软正致力于在 Chromium 浏览器项目中添加基于 Rust 的 PNG 图像解码器，这是一个更安全的组件，用于为 Chrome、Edge、Opera 和其他类似浏览器处理 PNG 图像。 [微软]

欧盟密码管理器与俄罗斯有联系：一项调查显示，总部位于西班牙的密码管理器 Passwork 与在俄罗斯宣传的同名密码管理器共享其代码库和“几乎相同的用户手册”。 据称，西班牙语版本一直在从 Passwork 的俄罗斯联合创始人之一管理的一家阿联酋公司接收软件更新。 西班牙 Passwork 的客户名单包括欧洲政府机构和大学，这引起了间谍活动的担忧。 [OCCRP]

印度因卡特尔行为对惠普处以罚款：在该公司与经销商串通在政府合同投标中操纵墨盒、碳粉和其他打印耗材的价格后，印度政府因卡特尔行为对惠普处以 1,440 万美元的罚款。 [ArsTechnica]

旧金山 CAO 严厉打击裸体应用程序：旧金山市检察官办公室已向苹果和谷歌发出停止函，并命令科技巨头从其商店中删除人工智能裸体应用程序，并停止从 CSAM 间接获利。 [有线]

政府、政治和政策

摩洛哥确认为 NSO 客户：摩洛哥国内情报部门的一名举报人和前成员证实，该国政府能够访问 NSO Pegasus 间谍软件，这与政府过去的公开否认相反。 该工具被大量用于监视异见人士、记者，甚至国外的政客。 [OCCRP // 禁忌故事]

英国废除数字身份证计划：一旦新首相安迪·伯纳姆周一上任，英国政府将废除拟议的数字身份证计划。 该计划于去年九月宣布，预计明年生效。 它涉及以移动应用程序的形式为英国公民和合法居民发放数字身份证。 该身份证旨在作为在英国工作权利的证明。 [路透社]

美国政府未能实施网络人员轮换：美国政府未能实施自己的一项在联邦机构之间轮换网络安全员工的计划。 自 2022 年以来，只有 8 名员工参与了该计划。 该计划的目的是在员工返回原机构之前向他们传授新技能。 [高//网络独家]

白宫宣布金鹰计划：特朗普政府启动了一项新计划，帮助协调开源项目和关键基础设施漏洞的披露和修补。 新的金鹰计划旨在大规模接收错误报告，这些错误报告通常是使用人工智能工具和前沿人工智能模型发现的。 CISA、财政部和五角大楼都参与了该计划。 [白宫]

法国禁止 Polymarket：法国政府已命令互联网服务提供商阻止访问预测市场博彩平台 Polymarket。 法国监管机构于 2024 年正式禁止该平台，并威胁对在该平台下注的法国公民处以最高 20 万欧元的罚款。 数据显示，尽管有禁令，Polymarket 在法国的用户群仍在增长，该机构开始积极执法。 西班牙五月份也禁止了 Polymarket。 [Engadget]

在这次《Risky Business》赞助商采访中，Casey Ellis 与 Thinkst 的 Haroon Meer 讨论了如何打造客户不讨厌的公司。 Haroon 解释了为什么 Thinkst 仍然免费提供 Canary 代币，以及为什么它避免了付费产品的年度价格上涨。 他们谈论埃里克·里斯 (Eric Ries) 的“廉洁”、罗伯·李 (Rob Lee) 在 Dragos 的 100 年公司方针，以及为什么让顾客满意是比追求简单的糖瘾更好的商业策略。

逮捕、网络犯罪和威胁情报

Graykey 制造商起诉员工泄露漏洞：Graykey 制造商 Magnet Forensics 起诉一名前员工，指控其泄露有关 iPhone 专有漏洞的详细信息。 Magnet 声称 Mario Del Gaudio 与他的新雇主和竞争对手公司 Paradigm Shift 分享了该漏洞的详细信息。 该漏洞在 Magnet 内部被追踪为 MSG，但由 Paradigm Shift 在博客文章中公开披露为 usbliter8。 该漏洞允许攻击者在使用 A12 和 A13 芯片的 Apple 设备的 SecureROM 内运行恶意代码。 这是一个硬件错误并且无法修补。 [Bloomberg // CourtListener // usbliter8 博客文章]

伦敦交通局黑客被判五年徒刑：一名英国法官判处 Scattered Spider 黑客组织的两名成员每人 5.5 年监禁。 Thalha Jubair 和 Owen Flowers 上个月承认在 2024 年 8 月对伦敦公共交通管理局进行了黑客攻击。 这次黑客攻击给伦敦交通局造成了数月的中断，并造成了 3900 万英镑的损失。 Jubair 在美国还被指控对 47 家美国公司进行黑客攻击和勒索，据称勒索至少 1.15 亿美元的赎金。 [NCA]

REvil 黑客在亚美尼亚被捕：亚美尼亚当局逮捕了 REvil 勒索软件组织的一名疑似成员。 亚历山大·埃尔马科夫 (Alexander Ermakov) 于 6 月底根据国际刑警组织的逮捕令在埃里温机场被捕。 一位名叫 Alexander Ermakov 的男子是 2022 年针对澳大利亚 Medibank 保险公司的勒索软件攻击的主要嫌疑人。 俄罗斯媒体声称，亚美尼亚当局逮捕了一名同名男子，真正的叶尔马科夫在俄罗斯，正在俄罗斯服限制自由刑，禁止他出国旅行。 [俄新社//危险的生意]

东帝汶捣毁诈骗中心：东帝汶警方突击搜查了首都帝力的三个网络诈骗中心。 警方逮捕了 253 名嫌疑人，其中大多数是中国人和印度尼西亚公民。 当局上个月还突袭了另一处院落。 [ABC]

国土安全部扣押了 30,000 张移动 SIM 卡：作为打击电话欺诈的一部分，国土安全部国土安全调查部在 6 月和 7 月扣押了 30,000 多张移动 SIM 卡。 [彭博社]

GTA 黑客出院，入狱：Lapsus$ 黑客组织的一名成员已从安全医院出院，并被转移到英国的普通监狱。 Arion Kurtaj 因在 2022 年入侵 Rockstar Games 并发布 GTA5 源代码和 GTA6 游戏玩法而再次面临审判。 Kurtaj 被诊断患有严重自闭症，并于 2023 年 12 月被判处无限期住院令。 [GameRant // Polygon]

UAT-11795 简介：思科正在利用 Starland RAT 和名为 WLDR Agent 的命令与控制 (C2) 内存植入来追踪针对美国和欧洲公司的新电子犯罪团伙。 [思科塔洛斯]

TAG-150 演变：eSentire 发布了 TAG-150 交易技术变化的详细信息，TAG-150 是 CastleLoader、CastleBot 和 CastleRAT 恶意软件菌株背后的电子犯罪组织，也被追踪为 DinDoor（基于 Deno 的加载程序）、NightshadeC2 和 DenoRAT（基于 Deno 的远程访问木马 (RAT)）。 最大的变化是他们采用了 ClickFix，这是每个人最喜欢的感染媒介。 [电子传感器]

俄罗斯更多 ViPNeT 漏洞利用：一个黑客组织正在使用 ViPNet 企业 VPN 软件在俄罗斯公司内部植入后门。 攻击者首先入侵一个VPN节点，然后利用该软件的更新机制在整个网络上安装后门。 ViPNet 所有者 Infotecs 已确认这些攻击并发布了安全更新。 去年4月也曾发生过类似的攻击浪潮。 [Infotecs // PositiveTechnologies // 卡巴斯基 // 去年的攻击]

稀缺性诈骗将继续存在：稀缺性诈骗是一种新的在线诈骗类别，其中威胁行为者为可用性或位置有限的在线服务运行虚假网站。 此类诈骗在过去几年中呈爆炸式增长，通常针对世界各地各个政府网站的预订网站。 [领域工具]

性勒索活动：最近性勒索电子邮件诈骗的激增与良好的 ol' Trik/Phorpiex 僵尸网络有关，该网络在这些年之后仍然存在。 [狂野点]

野外文本加盐：威胁行为者正在使用一种名为“文本加盐”的技术将文本隐藏在电子邮件中，并绕过传统和人工智能驱动的电子邮件安全系统的电子邮件垃圾邮件过滤器。 梭子鱼已经发现该技术被用于超过一百万起以零售为主题的网络钓鱼诈骗。 [梭鱼]

RubyGems 恶意软件：至少有两个休眠 RubyGems 帐户已被泄露，以将恶意软件推送到旧项目。 [合气道安全//步骤安全]

OAuth 客户端 ID 欺骗：威胁参与者使用 OAuth 客户端 ID 欺骗来滥用 Microsoft Entra ID 进行帐户枚举、检查密码有效性和帐户状态。 据 Proofpoint 称，该技术的使用量正在增加。 [证明点]

Proofpoint 观察到两个采用此技术的独立活动： • UNK_PyReq2323：>100 万目标用户，70 万以上欺骗客户端 ID • UNK_OutFlareAZ：>200 万目标用户，370 万欺骗客户端 ID 不同的工具和基础设施表明采用率不断提高。— ThreatInsight (@threatinsight.proofpoint.com) 2026 年 7 月 14 日 6:56下午

恶意软件技术报告

XZ Utils后门：Adrian Mastronardi出版了一本书，深入讲述了2024年以来的XZ Utils后门事件。[半秒]

Pegasus 间谍软件：国际特赦组织的安全团队利用过去的报告和最近的 WhatsApp 诉讼中的见解，发布了迄今为止最全面的 Pegasus 间谍软件分析。 [国际特赦组织]

ClickLock Stealer：已发现一种针对 macOS 用户的新信息窃取程序。 该工具被命名为 ClickLock，因为它在分发和安装过程中融合了 ClickFix 和储物柜策略。 [IB组]

CrashStealer：还有另一个 macOS 信息窃取程序，名为 CrashStealer，因为它试图模仿 Apple 的崩溃报告框架来收集浏览器凭据、加密货币钱包和钥匙串数据。 [贾夫]

ACR Stealer：Microsoft 报告自 4 月份以来在客户环境中部署 ACR Stealer 的攻击有所增加。 [微软]

BoryptGrab：近 300 个冒充合法软件的 GitHub 存储库实际上正在传播 BoryptGrab 信息窃取程序的一个版本。 【北极狼】

TELEPUZ：Elastic 发现一种正在野外部署的新恶意软件框架，该框架似乎与即将推出的 MaaS 有关。 [松紧带]

Spirals 勒索软件：博通的赛门铁克团队发现一种名为 Spirals 的新型勒索软件正在亚洲部署。 到目前为止还没有太多关于它的信息。 [博通]

NadMesh僵尸网络：新发现的僵尸网络专门针对AI基础设施和MCP生态系统。 自 7 月初以来，NadMesh 僵尸网络一直以 Ollama、ComfyUI 和其他人工智能相关服务器为目标。 该僵尸网络植入 SSH 后门用于控制和未来访问。 据中国安全公司奇安信称，该僵尸网络似乎是具有“明确商业意图”的“工业级”操作。 [奇安欣]

OkoBot 框架：研究人员发现了一种名为 OkoBot 的新型模块化恶意软件框架，它类似于信息窃取者，但更专注于从加密货币所有者和相关服务中窃取敏感数据。 [卡巴斯基]

“OkoBot 活动已持续一年多，在发布时仍然活跃。 此外，它正在适应，这表明这个框架正在得到维护，并且分发活动仍在继续。”

WackoGinx 网络钓鱼工具包：研究人员发现了一种名为 WackoGinx（也称为 WachoGinx）的新网络钓鱼工具包，可以运行针对 M365、Facebook、Gmail、LinkedIn 和 PayPal 的活动。 [威胁行动]

在这个肥皂盒版的播客中，帕特里克·格雷 (Patrick Gray) 与 Thinkst Canary 创始人哈龙·梅尔 (Haroon Meer) 谈论了他的“十年的欺骗”。

APT、网络间谍活动和信息行动

UTA0533 是新一波 SonicWall 零日攻击的幕后黑手：一个被追踪为 UTA0533 的黑客组织是 SonicWall SMA 设备中利用的两个零日攻击的幕后黑手。 零日漏洞包括 SSRF 和代码注入漏洞，可授予组对设备的根级别访问权限。 这些攻击始于 6 月下旬，并部署专为 SonicWall SMA VPN 设备设计的恶意软件。 SonicWall 上周发布了这两个零日漏洞的补丁。 [Volexity // SonicWall 补丁]

GoSerpent 活动：卡巴斯基正在追踪一个新的 APT 组织，该组织在针对东南亚政府和外交实体的活动中部署了 GoSerpent 后门、Stowaway 和 TmcLoader。 还没有归属。 [卡巴斯基]

Laundry Bear 成员曾在卡巴斯基工作：俄罗斯公民丹尼斯·奥布雷兹科 (Denis Obrezko) 去年在泰国被捕，被引渡到美国，并被指控参与 Laundry Bear APT 组织的黑客活动，他也曾在俄罗斯安全公司卡巴斯基工作。 一个由 Ctrl-Alt-Intel 组成的威胁情报分析师团队还发布了一份关于 Obrezko 的简介以及导致他被捕的操作安全错误，非常值得您阅读。 [路透社//Ctrl-Alt-Intel]

Sandworm 采用 ClickFix：即使他们是俄罗斯最先进的网络间谍组织之一，Sandworm 现在也使用 ClickFix 来传播恶意软件。 [CERT-UA]

有关 npm 的更多朝鲜信息：OSM 的 Jenn Gile 将两个 npm 恶意软件集群与朝鲜黑客及其 PolinRider 活动联系起来。 [开源恶意软件]

Operation Capsule Vault：说到朝鲜黑客活动，有人使用与教育和学术相关的网络钓鱼诱饵来传播 RokRAT 恶意软件。 [吉尼亚斯]

传染性面试活动：现在没有什么比试图在 IT 行业找到工作更危险的了，多亏了朝鲜黑客！ 撇开讽刺不谈，有一份关于传染性采访活动的新报告，Elastic 将其跟踪为 REF9403 活动。 该报告介绍了使用 SVG 文件通过隐写术隐藏恶意命令，这在其特定的方式中是一种原创，因为 SVG 文件到目前为止还没有被广泛滥用于隐写术。 [松紧带]

漏洞、安全研究和错误赏金

wp2shell 漏洞：WordPress 团队发布了一个安全更新，以修复该项目代码中发现的最严重的错误之一。 该漏洞是 WordPress REST API 中的 SQL 注入，未经身份验证的远程攻击者可以利用该漏洞在任何 WordPress 网站上运行恶意代码。 该问题可以在没有任何先决条件的情况下被利用，并影响自去年 12 月以来发布的所有 WordPress 版本。 WordPress 网站为超过 41% 的互联网网站提供支持。 该漏洞由 Searchlight Cyber​​ 发现，并被追踪为 CVE-2026-63030 或 wp2shell。 [Searchlight Cyber​​ // wp2shell // WordPress 补丁]

HollowByte 攻击：一个新漏洞可能会导致仅使用 11 字节有效负载的 OpenSSL 服务器崩溃。 未经身份验证的远程攻击者可以利用此攻击，并迫使服务器在任何安全 TLS 握手开始之前分配大量内存。 OpenSSL 项目上个月发布了当前和旧库版本的补丁。 该漏洞由 Okta 发现，命名为 HollowByte。 [奥克塔]

Android 锁屏绕过：就像多年来 Siri 一直被用来绕过锁屏一样，现在轮到 Gemini 被滥用来绕过 Android 锁屏了。 【安卓头条】

漏洞披露指南：CISA 和国际合作伙伴发布了关于建立适当的协调披露计划的联合指南。 [中钢协]

Nightmare Eclipse 放弃了 LegacyHive：安全研究员 Nightmare Eclipse 上周发布了一个新的 Windows 漏洞。 该零日漏洞名为 LegacyHive，是 Windows User Profile Service 中的本地权限提升。 [夜行者项目 // GitHub // SecurityWeek]

信息安全行业

威胁/趋势报告：Acronis、CompariTech、Moonlock、ReliaQuest、Sonatype、Sophos、Thales 和 WatchGuard 最近发布了涵盖各种威胁和信息安全行业趋势的报告和摘要。

BSides 布达佩斯 2026 视频：4 月举行的 BSides 布达佩斯 2026 安全会议的演讲可在 YouTube 上观看。

有风险的商业播客

在本期《两个书呆子之间》中，Tom Uren 和 The Grugq 使用乌克兰网络安全机构两名成员撰写的一篇新论文中发布的数据讨论了漏洞利用对于网络操作的重要性。

在这一集中的《风险商业专题》中，James Wilson 与 SORadar CISO Ensar Seker 进行了交谈，James Wilson 则讨论了该公司深入研究 Fortibleed 活动的情况。 对未知服务器上一个奇怪的开放目录的小型调查扩展到发现针对 400,000 台 Fortinet 设备的攻击。
